Class TextUserInterface

java.lang.Object
view.TextUserInterface
All Implemented Interfaces:
View
public class TextUserInterface extends Object implements View
A text-based (console) implementation of the View interface for the university events app.

All user interaction happens through System.in and System.out. Error messages are prefixed with "[ERROR]" and success messages with "[SUCCESS]" for visual clarity in the terminal.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors

    Description

    Constructs a new TextUserInterface reading from System.in.
